tellurium.feature.chatTextBoxOpacity.too: Changes the opacity of the bar in chat in which you type your message
tellurium.feature.crawlHitbox.tooltip: If enabled, hitboxes will be rendered when a player has an elytra, is swimming or is crawling
tellurium.feature.elytraCrystalHitbox.to: If enabled, hitboxes of end crystals will be rendered when wearing an elytra
tellurium.feature.enchantmentDisplay.too: Vanilla: I - X, Decimal: 1 - 255, Roman: I - CCLV, Both: I (1) - CCLV (255)
tellurium.feature.guiSneak.tooltip: If enabled, you won't stop sneaking after opening a GUI
tellurium.feature.hitbox.disable.eyeLine: Hides the box around an entity's eyes in its hitbox
tellurium.feature.hitbox.disable.lookVec: Hides the arrow that points in an entity's direction
tellurium.feature.indicators.elytra.tool: Rendered when you have an elytra equipped
tellurium.feature.indicators.lowDurabili: Rendered when any equipped armor piece is under 50 durability
tellurium.feature.indicators.lowHealth.t: Rendered when you have less than 3 hearts (2 instant health II potions)
Rendered when you have less than 6.5 hearts (1 instant health II potion)
tellurium.feature.indicators.maceSlowFal: Rendered when you are holding a mace and have the slow-fall effect
tellurium.feature.indicators.offset.tool: The distance from the crosshair where indicators will be rendered
tellurium.feature.indicators.repot.toolt: Rendered when strength or speed are below 6 seconds left
Rendered when you are holding a disabled shield
tellurium.feature.indicators.size.toolti: The size of the indicators in the screen
tellurium.feature.indicators.totem.toolt: Rendered when you have a totem in your inventory but not in your offhand
tellurium.feature.invertSprint.tooltip: If enabled, the functionality of the sprint key will be inverted
tellurium.feature.perfectReachSound.tool: Plays a sound whenever you hit an entity from ~3 blocks
Removes the falling animation that plays when an entity dies
tellurium.feature.speedHitbox.tooltip: If enabled, hitboxes will be rendered when you are moving fast enough
tellurium.feature.speedHitboxThreshold.t: The speed (in b/s) you need for hitboxes to render when Speed Hitboxes are enabled
tellurium.feature.storeChatMessage.toolt: Stores your last message if you didn't send it
